title: Phone
body:
Welcome to The Moderator Phone mod! This mod gives you an Operator Interface, to change many settings very easily. It's also very useful to cheat in survival. Also, if you've found any bugs, issues or other problems, or have an idea for the coming soon version 1.3, please take a minute to tell me.
My Discord is GreedyAllay. Oh yeah, and 1.17.x support arrived! It has been tested on a server yet, which didn't quite work fully, but you can try it, it's years ago.

Also, a bug exists that you somehow cannot open the phone menu on server-side. Anyways, these are the currently available possibilities:

 

V1.2BETA

        World Options

    allows you to change the world's basic settings

    Time Control

    Day

    Noon

    Night

    Midnight

    Difficulty Control

    Easy

    Normal

    Hard

    Peaceful

    Weather Control

    Clear

    Rain

    Thunder

     
        Gamemode

    Change your personal Game Mode

    Spectator

    Creative

    Survival

    Adventure

     
        Teleport

    Allows you to teleport wherever you like, including the newly added; Preset Commands Tab

    10 Blocks (XYZ)

    Tp 10 blocks in a custom direction

    5 Blocks (XYZ)

    Tp 5 blocks in a custom direction

    Custom (XYZ)

    Go to a location, defined by user

    Custom (Add)

    Allows you to "Add" blocks to your coordinates

    Dimension

    You can switch between dimensions, like the End, Nether and, off course the Overworld

     
        Teleporting Presets

    Save 5 different locations, into a variable file. NOTE: everyone can access it. Even with a different phone.

    Preset 1

    Preset 2

    Preset 3

    Preset 4

    Preset 5

     
        TNT (nuker)

    Allows you to spawn 1, 4 or 16 TNT at your current location. NOTE: the explosion won't kill you in survival. It does damage other players

     

     
        Effects

    Applies you a Preset Effect, or by entering an effect ID.

    Regeneration

    Speed

    Jumpboost

    Haste

    Strength

    Levitation

    Clear Effects

    Clear every single status effect of player

    Custom Effect ID

    Like i said, you can enter an effect ID, e.g. "luck"

     
        Items

    Cheat some items into survival without Creative needed

    Combat

    Valuables

    Foodstuffs

    Blocks

    Tools

     
        Operator

    This gives you the opportunity to execute Operator commands, without Operator required!

    /time

    /kill

    Kill any mob you want, or just some friends, or random players. If you want to. Why would you want to. WHY DID I ADD THIS.

    /fill

    Fills a certain block for you.

    /setblock

    Places a by user specified block at the entered coordinates. NOTE: you can use Tilde.

    /gamerule

    Allows you to set gamerules like keepInventory and that stuff.

    /difficulty

    /summon

    Summon any mob, with a custom amount NOTE: don't spawn 9999 TNT. please.

    /dimension

    Switch Dimension

    /head

    Give yourself a player's head

    Custom Commands

    Helps you execute a minecraft command, without Operator required!

     
        Pause

    It just pauses the game for you.

    Crash Server

    U can crash your internal server. Pretty pointless.

     
        Checkpoint

    Set the World Spawn point, or just your own spawn point.

     

    Setworldspawn

    Set Spawnpoint

     
        Settings

    Currently only allows you to lock your phone with a password. NOTE: if you forget your password, New World.

    Password

     

     

    Oh my god finally done writing the description!! It took like over 45 minutes.

     

     
donate here :)
